contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Per-program credentialing surfaces — Phase 1 live (Tribo Bahia Mirim + Butterfly Effect)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/104
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/2
  
  Details:
  Phase 1 of the per-program credentialing platform spec'd in agentic_ai_context/CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md (Phase 0 doc shipped earlier today in TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#143). Ten new files committed to both truesight_me_beta and truesight_me_prod; live on https://truesight.me/programs.html.
  
  New surfaces:
  - truesight.me/programs.html — parent index; sibling to fundraisers.html; framed around experiential learning credentialing (learner-facing lens vs the funder-facing lens fundraisers uses)
  - truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/ — Tribo Bahia Mirim capoeira lineage: landing + manifest + cohort listing + per-practitioner CV
  - truesight.me/programs/butterfly-effect/ — ERA Professionals' Butterfly Effect program: same four files; cohort empty until Bilal's first cert lands in lineage-credentials
  - js/program-shell.js — shared rendering shell. All program HTML files are thin shells that call TrueSightProgramShell.init({manifestPath, type}). The shell loads manifest, renders co-brand strip, and for members/credential views fetches lineage-credentials data via jsDelivr-primary + raw.githubusercontent-fallback (matches truesight_me_beta#82 GFW-resilience pattern).
  
  URL shape baked in for printed-certificate QR codes (permanent — never retired even on later white-label upgrade):
    truesight.me/programs/<program-slug>/credentials/#<member-slug>
  
  Live verification (headless Chromium against https://truesight.me/ post-deploy):
    - programs.html serves 200; both program cards present
    - tribomirim/credentials/#gary-teh shows 'Gary Teh — Credentialed via Tribo Bahia Mirim — Capoeira lineage' with the program-specific section: 4 practice sessions, 40 minutes logged, lineage root Bico Duro, 4 recent events listed
    - co-brand strip renders 'Tribo Bahia Mirim — Capoeira lineage · Co-issued with TrueSight DAO'
    - butterfly-effect/members.html shows the empty-state message correctly
    - zero console errors
  
  Key architectural property validated by Gary's appearance: zero data changes were needed. The existing capoeira.agroverse.shop → lineage-credentials cron has been recording Gary's 4 practice sessions; the new program-scoped surface just inverts the query (filter index.json by primary_program == capoeira-tribo-mirim) and renders the same per-CV JSON with co-brand chrome. No new data layer, no migration — the platform absorbs new partners by adding a manifest + four ~6KB HTML shells.
  
  Companion Phase 0 spec: TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#143 (squash-merged c58ad14).
  
  PRs merged 2026-05-16:
    - TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#104 (squash 8a58976)
    - TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod#2  (squash c8de9ca)
  
  Out of scope follow-ups:
    - Site-wide nav: existing pages don't yet link to /programs.html. Members.html and fundraisers.html are the natural spots to add the link as a small nav-update PR.
    - cert_compiler.py variant in tokenomics for QR PNG batch generation against the new URL space (Phase 3 — defer until Bilal's first cohort is ready to print).
    - public_listable consent flag in lineage-credentials member records (Phase 5 — current behavior treats all entries as public, aligning with today's canonical credentials/#<slug> page).
    - Multi-program memberships: primary_program is exclusive in today's data. If a learner is in both Tribo Mirim AND Butterfly Effect, they only appear in one listing. Punt to when this becomes a real case.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
